subject: [PATCH v6 11/20] nfsd: apply the notify mask to the delegation when requested

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch modifies the NFSv4 server to apply the requested notify mask to directory delegations when notifications are enabled by the client. If the client requests notifications without specifying NOTIFY4_GFLAG_EXTEND, no notifications will be offered as the server does not provide directory offset information required for classic notifications. The patch ensures that the lease acquisition sets the appropriate ignore mask based on the applied notify mask.
